name: Renewal price going up over 1200% : r/NameCheap - Reddit
snippet:
I got a message from Namecheap yesterday alerting me that my renewal is coming up. The renewal price for 1 year is now $332.80 per year. So ... Namecheap .com renewal $14.76 - has it always been this price? Renewals pricing is out of control : r/NameCheap - Reddit More results from www.reddit.com
Just got some painful news from Namecheap about my domain renewal: they are raising it to over $300/year. Here's what happened: In Dec 2021 I purchased an available domain from Namecheap for $1.80 for Year 1 (plus fees, so $1.98). This was a one-year promotional price; I was aware this price was not the regular annual price. When I purchased the domain it did not list a "renewal" price ...
